zh.lifeSummary: 當Gómez Pérez de Toledo於大約1306年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Fernán Gómez de Toledo25歲，母親Teresa Vázquez del Saz17歲。他於1332年與Teresa Alfonso de Toledo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年6月29日之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gómez Pérez de Toledo于大约1306年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Fernán Gómez de Toledo25岁，母亲Teresa Vázquez del Saz17岁。他于1332年与Teresa Alfonso de Toledo在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年6月29日之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toledo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Ramon, Rafael, Juan, Antonio, Jesus, Miguel, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco.

Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from the city in central Spain, which was the capital of the Visigothic state between the 6th and 8th centuries. Its role declined for three centuries after the Muslim invasion of Spain, until it was taken as the capital of the kingdom of Castile between the 11th and 16th centuries. It was a major cultural and political center throughout the Middle Ages, and was also the home of an important Jewish community. The placename, first recorded in Latin as Toletum, is of obscure etymology, possibly connected with Toleto in Piedmont; Jewish tradition connects it with Hebrew toledot ‘generations’, but this is no more than folk etymology. Compare Toledano .

Jewish (Sephardic): also an adoption of the Spanish surname (see 1 above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the surname their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Toledano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Shlomo, Igal, Moshe, Shimon, Ehud, Shmuel, Yehuda.  Spanish Alberto, Gonzalo, Alina, Carlos, Conrado, Elena, Enrique, Evelia, Luis, Manuel, Miguel, Ramona.  French Gabrielle, Michel.
Spanish and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Toledo (see   Toledo  ), from an adjectival form of the placename.

nameMeanings.name: Gómez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

en.lifeSummary: When Gómez Pérez de Toledo was born about 1306, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Fernán Gómez de Toledo, was 25 and his mother, Teresa Vázquez del Saz, was 17. He married Teresa Alfonso de Toledo in 1332, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 29 June 1340, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gómez Pérez de Toledo est né environ 1306, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Fernán Gómez de Toledo, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Teresa Vázquez del Saz, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Teresa Alfonso de Toledo en 1332, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 29 juin 1340, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gómez Pérez de Toledo um 1306 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fernán Gómez de Toledo 25 und seine Mutter Teresa Vázquez del Saz 17. Er hat 1332 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Teresa Alfonso de Toledo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 29. Juni 1340 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez Pérez de Toledo è nato il circa 1306 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Fernán Gómez de Toledo, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Teresa Vázquez del Saz, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Teresa Alfonso de Toledo nel 1332, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 29 giugno 1340, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Gómez Pérez de Toledoが約1306年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Fernán Gómez de Toledoは25歳，母Teresa Vázquez del Sazは17歳であった。1332年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでTeresa Alfonso de Toledoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年6月29日以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gómez Pérez de Toledo(이)가 대략 1306년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fernán Gómez de Toledo(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Teresa Vázquez del Saz(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1332년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Teresa Alfonso de Toledo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 6월 29일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1306–after 29 June 1340: ойролцоогоор 1306 он–1340 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 29–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gómez Pérez de Toledo nasceu aproximadamente 1306, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Fernán Gómez de Toledo, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Teresa Vázquez del Saz, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Teresa Alfonso de Toledo em 1332, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 29 de junho de 1340, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gómez Pérez de Toledo родился около 1306 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Fernán Gómez de Toledo было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Teresa Vázquez del Saz, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Teresa Alfonso de Toledo в 1332 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 29 июнь 1340 г. в его родном городе.

sm.about 1306–after 29 June 1340: e tusa o le 1306–ina ua ma'ea le 29 Iuni 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gómez Pérez de Toledo nació aproximadamente 1306, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Fernán Gómez de Toledo, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Teresa Vázquez del Saz, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Teresa Alfonso de Toledo en 1332, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 29 de junio de 1340, en su pueblo.
